response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly matches the role's AI agent requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD practitioner, authored a D assertion library and test runner) and broad polyglot background fit the multi-language expectation. Gaps are in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin exposure, but the foundation is strong enough that ramp-up should be quick.
strengths: Current hands-on AI agent / MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq matches a key requirement
Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, built own test tooling, ran workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned (only Java, and limited recent use)
Inconsistency between resume header name and contact details/links suggests possible template/identity mismatch worth clarifying
